title.en: ARShades Services — Terms and Conditions of Use

documents.notes: Covers VTO, 3D Viewer, VTO Explorer, Mirror, Gateway and Campaign Catalogue. Supersedes the ARShades VTO Terms of 21 March 2025. AR PD Meter is governed by the dedicated terms (key: terms-ar-pd-meter). v1.3 (2026-07-10) adds the 3D Viewer service to §1.2 and a Google Play clause to §10. Italian authoritative; en/es/fr/de are courtesy translations.

title.it: Termini e Condizioni — AR PD Meter
title.en: AR PD Meter — Terms and Conditions of Use

documents.notes: Supplemental to the ARShades Services Terms; includes measurement disclaimer and express biometric consent flow. es/fr/de courtesy translations added 2026-07-10. Italian authoritative; en/es/fr/de are courtesy translations.

title.it: Modello — Termini di integrazione ARShades per Clienti (Servizi VTO)
title.en: Client ARShades Integration Terms — VTO Services Template

documents.notes: Template, not published legal terms: parametric model (mustache {{...}} variables, JSON Schema in artifacts.schema) for the VTO Services (VTO, 3D Viewer, VTO Explorer, Mirror, Gateway, Campaign Catalogue), generated and accepted in the ARShades in-experience consent module. AR PD Meter has a SEPARATE, INDEPENDENT template (key: client-terms-ar-pd-meter-template): no cross-reference between the two even when the client uses both. Generated instances are NOT published here (they live in the ARS_TermsAndCond Firestore collection) and must be reviewed by the client's counsel. Excluded from GitHub Pages (front matter published: false) to avoid Liquid interpolation of the template variables.

title.it: Modello — Termini AR PD Meter per Clienti
title.en: Client ARShades Integration Terms — AR PD Meter Template

documents.notes: Template, not published legal terms. Standalone white-label AR PD Meter terms, generated when ar_pd_enabled=true and accepted in the ARShades consent module before the measurement. INDEPENDENT of the VTO Services template (client-terms-template): no cross-reference even when the client uses both solutions; self-contained and lean (no VTO casuistry). Shares schema.json and intake-checklist with the VTO Services template. Express consent always rendered to Spaarkly as data controller (§2.4). Generated instances live in the ARS_TermsAndCond Firestore collection and must be reviewed by the client's counsel. Excluded from GitHub Pages (front matter published: false).
